questions.question: References are arranged alphabetically in some papers or in order of sequence as it comes out in the paper. This holds the summary of the information of all of your:
Which of the following is NOT information needed in making a referencing list?
For web sources, the referencing list requires a Uniform Resource Locator (URL) or web address, the date of access, or a _____.
What does APA stand for in APA format?
APA style was developed by social and behavioral scientists to standardize:
The hanging indent in APA format is:
What is the penalty for plagiarism according to the PDF?
options: Six years of imprisonment and a fine of fifty thousand to one hundred fifty thousand pesos
Only a fine of ten thousand pesos

questions.question: The Cybercrime law that addresses online plagiarism is:
In APA format, the reference entry for a book typically includes the author's name, title, publisher, and:
Which of the following is an example of a book reference in APA format?
options: Sutevski, D. (2022, March 9). 10 Reasons Your Employees Should Have Bonuses. Entrepreneurship in a Box.
Marquez-Fong, S. E., & Tigno, C. (2016). Practical Research 1. Vibal Group, Inc.
Roberts, B. W., et al. (2009). What is conscientiousness?

questions.question: In the reference entry 'Sutevski, D. (2022, March 9). 10 Reasons Your Employees Should Have Bonuses And Stipends. Entrepreneurship in a Box. https://www...' this is an example of a:
When citing a website article with no author and no date, what should be used in place of the author's name?
In the reference entry 'Del Castillo, M. R. & Gayao, R. G. (2010). A Municipality's Experience... JPAIR Multidisciplinary Research Journal, 4(1).' this is an example of a:
When a journal article has multiple authors, how should they be listed in the reference entry?
options: Only the first author is listed followed by 'et al.'
All authors are listed in the order they appear
Only the corresponding author is listed
Authors are listed alphabetically by first name

questions.question: An in-text citation is a citation within your writing that shows where you found your information, facts, quotes, and:
All APA in-text citations require the author's last name and the year of publication. Page numbers are required for:
If a source has no date, what abbreviation should be used in the in-text citation?
The two types of in-text citation formats in APA are:
In a parenthetical citation, all citation information is placed:
options: At the end of the sentence in parentheses
At the beginning of the sentence

questions.question: In a narrative citation, the author's name is:
options: Placed in parentheses at the end
Part of the text of the sentence

questions.question: In the example 'Stein (2018) studied whether the early onset of Alzheimer's disease... His findings revealed... (p. 42),' this is an example of a:
In the example '...the socially constructed nature of reality... (Denzin & Lincoln, 2011, p. 8),' this is an example of a:
According to the PDF, which of the following is a phrase that signals an idea belongs to another writer?

Phrases that signal an idea belongs to another writer include: 'According to Starr (2010)...', 'As Starr (2010) noted...', and 'In the words of Starr (2010)...' These are examples of _____ in-text citations.
What is NOT included in APA Style reference list entries and in-text citations?
In APA title case, which of the following should be capitalized in a paper title?
options: All minor words (conjunctions of three letters or fewer)
All nouns, verbs, adjectives, adverbs, and words of four letters or more
Only the first word of the title

questions.question: In APA title case, which of the following should be lowercased?
options: Conjunctions of three letters or fewer, prepositions of three letters or fewer, and articles 'a,' 'an,' and 'the'
Words of four letters or more

questions.question: In APA title case, the second part of hyphenated major words should be:
In APA title case, which of the following is capitalized because it is a verb?
In APA title case, the word 'with' is capitalized because it has how many letters?
In a reference entry, how should the paper title be formatted?
In APA format, the paper title should be _____ and placed one double-spaced blank line between the paper title and the author names.
In the reference entry 'Reyes, A., & Oronce, O. (2024). E-Math: Worktext in General Mathematics (2nd ed.). REX Book Store,' the '(2nd ed.)' indicates:

In the journal reference 'Roberts, B. W., Lejuez, C., Krueger, R. F., Richards, J. M., & Hill, P. L. (2009). What is conscientiousness and how can it be assessed? Developmental Psychology, 50(5), 1315-1330,' the volume number is:
In the journal reference 'Roberts, B. W., et al. (2009). What is conscientiousness... Developmental Psychology, 50(5), 1315-1330,' the issue number is:
